Cade Babin

Computer Science · Security & Offensive Tooling

I'm a third-year at Northeastern studying computer science, with a focus on security, low-level systems, and offensive tooling. I like to build small things that work end-to-end — then pick them apart until they don't. My goal is to leave school with a red-team or security-engineering role where I'm paid to keep honest systems honest, and where the bugs I hunt are real ones.
